ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the device was installed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the device is installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last check or update */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Current battery level of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that recorded the measurement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "co" REAL /* Carbon monoxide level in ppm */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level in percentage */,
  "light" INTEGER /* Light level (True if light is on, False if off) */,
  "lpg" REAL /* Liquefied petroleum gas level in ppm */,
  "motion" INTEGER /* Motion detected (True if motion is detected, False if not) */,
  "smoke" REAL /* Smoke level in ppm */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the device location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the device location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the device location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., high CO, high temperature) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "acknowledged_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who acknowledged the alert */,
  "acknowledged_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was acknowledged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_acknowledged_by FOREIGN KEY ("acknowledged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, operator, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last successful login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device accessed (if applicable) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the report period */,
  "report_period_end" TEXT /* End date of the report period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., calibration, repair, replacement) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance activity in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_maintenance_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
